description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named WebAssembly Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Node.js to the latest LTS version, installs Emscripten version 3.1.0, installs dependencies with npm ci, builds TypeScript with npm run build-ts, builds WebAssembly with a series of Emscripten commands and npm run build-wasm, and runs tests with npm test.
